description:
NOTE: THIS IS AN ATARI (FIRST CAPTURE) GO PROBLEM.

After a short and boring atari go game, played without any captures, simply grabbing territory, Black realizes White is 8 points ahead of Black. Black tries to live with 1, but 2 counters it. However, White slips up and plays 4, instead of A. How can black live now?

REMEMBER: THIS IS ATARI GO. FIRST PERSON TO CAPTURE WINS.
